message:
test(bd-28kw): add 26 unit tests for handler.rs

Cover BidirectionalSenders builders (with_sampling, with_elicitation,
both, clone, debug), create_context_with_progress_and_senders all
branches, custom handler overrides (version, timeout, output_schema),
mounted handler delegation (timeout, output_schema, read_with_uri),
and multiple progress notifications. Server test count: 1080.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
